HGSS.493.0000:
Hello.\f
To which floor may I take you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.493.0001: I look forward to serving you again.
HGSS.493.0004: Uh... We are already on that floor?
HGSS.493.0005:
First floor has the Service Counter
and the main entrance.
HGSS.493.0006:
Second floor has the Trainer’s Market
where you can buy everything you need.
HGSS.493.0007:
Third floor has the TM Shop
to power up your Pokémon.
HGSS.493.0008:
Fourth floor has the Wiseman Gifts,
which has the perfect gifts.
HGSS.493.0009:
Fifth floor has the Battle Collection
to raise stats.
HGSS.493.0010:
Sixth floor has the Rooftop Atrium
for a nice break.
